project: WasmTarget.jl Architecture B — Full Zero-Server Build
goal: Julia source string → browser parses → lowers → type-infers → codegen → executes, ZERO server

stories.title: Audit unified module exports for Arch B pipeline gaps
stories.description: Audited all WASM modules. Key finding: browser/eval_julia.wasm (2.2MB, 217 exports) IS the Arch B entry point. Supports binary arithmetic via pre-baked compile_from_codeinfo.

stories.title: Audit parser entry point — can we parse a source string from JS?
stories.description: eval_julia_wasm takes WasmGC string, dispatches by byte pattern. ParseStream creation works but parse_stmts hits unreachable for multiplicative precedence. Full JuliaSyntax parse not available via eval_julia_wasm yet.

stories.title: Build Architecture B E2E demo (e2e_demo_arch_b.cjs)
stories.description: Built and verified. 10/10 binary ops pass. ZERO server dependency.

stories.title: Build Architecture B regression suite (20 groups, 100 cases)
stories.description: Built run_arch_b_tests.cjs + e2e_arch_b_tests.jl. 20/20 groups, 100/100 test cases ALL PASS.

stories.title: Fix parse_stmts unreachable for multiplicative precedence
stories.description: parse_stmts hits unreachable when * or / operators are in the source string due to stubbed functions in parse_unary path. Need to identify and implement missing stubs.

stories.title: Add multi-statement expression support to eval_julia
stories.description: Extend eval_julia_to_bytes_vec to handle expressions like x*x+1 via full JuliaSyntax parse rather than byte-level pattern matching.

stories.title: Add function definition parsing + lowering
stories.description: Handle function definitions like f(x::Int64)=x*x+1 — parse → lower to CodeInfo → typeinf → codegen. This enables the same 20 functions as Arch A/C.

stories.title: Build full Arch B demo: f(5n)===26n from source string
stories.description: Source string 'f(x::Int64) = x*x + Int64(1)' → browser WASM compile → f(5n)===26n. The ultimate Arch B acceptance gate.
